message: Querying RAGFlow agent for: TritonCTS crash segfault Signal 11 in separateMacroRegSinks odb::dbNet::get1stSignalInput during OpenROAD CTS with SRAM macros. How to skip CTS or prevent crash with CF_SRAM macros?

function.arguments: {"query": "TritonCTS crash segfault Signal 11 in separateMacroRegSinks odb::dbNet::get1stSignalInput during OpenROAD CTS with SRAM macros. How to skip CTS or prevent crash with CF_SRAM macros?"}
function.name: query_ragflow

function.arguments:
{"command": "MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
CONFIG="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json"

# Check current config for CTS settings
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$CONFIG') as f:
    c = json.load(f)
print('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE:', c.get('CTS_SINK_CLUSTERING_ENABLE'))
print('CLOCK_PORT:', c.get('CLOCK_PORT'))
print('Available CTS keys:', [k for k in c.keys() if 'CTS' in k.upper() or 'CLOCK' in k.upper()])
"

echo ""
echo "=== Check if there's a way to set CTS macro exclusion ==="
# Look at what CTS options LibreLane supports
python3 -m librelane.steps OpenROAD.CTS --help 2>/dev/null | grep -i "macro\|cts\|clock\|dont" | head -20 || echo "Can't get CTS help"", "timeout": 15}
function.name: execute_bash

args.query: TritonCTS crash segfault Signal 11 in separateMacroRegSinks odb::dbNet::get1stSignalInput during OpenROAD CTS with SRAM macros. How to skip CTS or prevent crash with CF_SRAM macros?
